name: Lawrence Rossi
text_appearance: A fairly short girl (4ft 8inch) with ginger hair, with bright brown eyes and pale skin with freckles. She wears white ribbons that were a gift from her late mother. She often wears a Union gray jumpsuit, a standard mechanic's uniform with her surname embroidered above a GMS logo on the left chest. Her steel-toed work boots were notably modified with mag-clamp integration.
history: Lawrence, born and raised in Cradle. The only daughter of Mateo Rossi and his deceased wife Angela Rossi. A prodigal mechanical engineer with hopeful eyes and hope for the future that Union's three core pillars promised. She grew up following her father's footsteps as someone who once worked maintenance bays for blink stations, finding it admirable that he was able to keep the universe connected and peaceful under Union rule through the simple act of lending his hands and expertise to those brave star-farers and peacekeepers that would pass him by. He'd even been able to fix up battle scarred mechs that had seen both glory and loss in equal measure, like hands that held the divine and molded it to their vision. She wanted to be a guiding star like her father. A lifeline and safeguard in the abyss, one of the many hands that held up the branches that kept the tree of union's rule aloft in the stars beyond the blue skies of cradle. That was why she went into the Union Naval Training Academy with a specialization into mechanic engineering. Now she lends her expertise to Union officially fresh after graduation.

systems.flavorDescription: By installing additional armor plating, redundant firing circuits, and enhanced insulation to magazines the longevity of a frame’s armaments can be greatly enhanced.
The GMS Type-3 Projected Shield traps and denies incoming projectiles by projecting an aggressive, superpositional anti-ballistic barrier.

weapon.flavorDescription:
Much like GMS mechs, GMS weapons are reliable galactic standards, made using interchangeable parts and built to withstand almost any conditions. There are three lines currently in production.
The Type-III (T-3) line is made up of heavy weapons, ordnance, and other exotic, specialized, or massive weapons. A broad classification, the T-3 range includes conventional-kinetic anti-materiel rifles, super-rapid cycling pulse rifles, missile racks, cannons, and drone nexuses – “hive”style launchers that serve as miniature factory, hangar, and deployment systems for portable drones. The classification also includes the fearsome “segment knife”, a system that uses flash-printing to produce disposable edged weapons in a vicinity around the user.

armor.flavorDescription: Light hardsuits are usually made from reactive, cloth-like weaves, with limited plating and few powered components to maximize mobility. Like other hardsuits, they can be sealed against vacuum, and protect against a decent amount of radiation and other harmful particles.

weapons.flavorDescription: Medium signature weapons are assault rifles, shotguns, pack-fed lasers, or disruption guns.
Light signature weapons might be oversized revolvers, braces of pistols, and submachine guns.

gear.flavorDescription: A miniaturized version of Union’s full-scale printers, handheld printers can be used to make simple objects out of flexible and durable plastic – as long as you have the right pattern chip.

Dataplating is a general term for any comm-linked jewelry, subdermal netting, wearable jaw, brow, or maxillary plates, etc., that allows subvocal communication and persistent heads-up and augmented reality displays without wearing a helm. Dataplates can quickly translate nearly any language, and allow users to communicate with each other all but silently.
These clamps attach easily to any metal surface, enhancing maneuverability in zero-g environments or when repairing mechs. They can be carried or fitted to boots.
